name: The Iron Verdict
specialty: Specializing in dangerous extraction missions and high-risk salvage operations, their technical prowess lies in their ability to navigate the ever-shifting rifts with minimal casualties.

members.name: Rhys Vorenus
members.note: Scars mar his weathered face, remnants of past battles that have hardened him into a ruthless, calculating strategist.

members.name: Elysia Thorne
members.note: With an uncanny sense for finding hidden trails, she is the silent, deadly force that keeps the crew one step ahead of danger.

visual: Clad in reinforced leather armor and equipped with an assortment of ancient weapons, they move with a grim determination through the Undercity. A symbol of a broken scale etched into each member's gear serves as a reminder of their unwavering pursuit of justice.
reputation_note: The Iron Verdict is a name whispered with respect and fear in the Undercity, a crew that never backs down from a challenge and always delivers on their promises.
history: [2026-03-13] Completed a investigation-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+1/5)
